description: The Porsche Macan, produced since 2014, is Porsche's compact SUV and consistent best-seller. The GTS and Turbo with their 2.9-litre twin-turbo V6 offer serious performance, while the second generation introduces a fully electric powertrain with up to 639 bhp in Turbo trim.
